title: helichrysum subumbellatum
intro: Helichrysum subumbellatum, also known as the yellow hill daisy or mountain everlast, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum subumbellatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
